_comment: RECORDED LineLock /api/edge 200 payload (delivered on the paid retry) + the PAYMENT-RESPONSE receipt that would ride the response headers. Contract per _BUILD_BRIEF.md. The receipt tx here is a PLACEHOLDER for shape tests only — never presented to a user as a real settlement (wc_edge only ever cites a receipt returned by a genuine paid call).
